hero.description: Specialized in creating exceptional web experiences with React, TypeScript and the latest frontend technologies. Passionate about UI/UX design and performance optimization.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about creating exceptional digital experiences that combine elegant design with robust functionality.
about.storyText1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with over 3 years of experience creating modern and responsive web applications. My focus is on writing clean, scalable and maintainable code.
about.storyText2: I specialize in React, TypeScript and the latest frontend technologies, always looking for new ways to improve user experience and optimize application performance.

experiences.title: Senior Frontend Developer
experiences.description: Leading the development of modern React applications and optimizing user experience.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer
experiences.description: Developing responsive user interfaces and reusable components.

experiences.title: Junior Developer
experiences.description: Starting my career in frontend development with HTML, CSS and vanilla JavaScript.

skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: A diverse set of technologies and tools that allow me to create complete and efficient solutions.

softSkills.title: Soft
softSkills.subtitle: The interpersonal skills that help me work effectively in a team

projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: A collection of projects that demonstrate my experience and passion for frontend development.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: Complete e-commerce platform built with React, TypeScript and Node.js. Includes shopping cart, payments, user management and admin panel.

items.title: Task Management App
items.description: Task management application with drag & drop, real-time collaboration and push notifications. Built with Next.js and Socket.io.

items.title: Weather Dashboard
items.description: Interactive weather dashboard with maps, charts and forecasts. Integrates multiple weather APIs and displays real-time data.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.description: Personal portfolio website with modern design, smooth animations and SEO optimization. Built with React and deployed on Vercel.

items.title: Mobile Banking App
items.description: Mobile banking application with biometric authentication, secure transfers and account management. Developed with React Native.

items.title: AI Chat Assistant
items.description: AI-powered chat assistant that answers questions and helps with tasks. Integrates OpenAI API and natural language processing.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's work together to create something amazing.

info.title: Let's talk about your project
info.description: I'm always interested in new challenges and opportunities. If you have an idea or project in mind, don't hesitate to contact me. I'll respond as soon as possible.

form.title: Send me a message
form.success: Message sent successfully! I'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Frontend Developer passionate about creating exceptional digital experiences. Specialized in React, TypeScript and the latest web technologies.
